name: Corporate Office
description_short: One Nevada Credit Union is a federally insured credit union offering competitive lending rates, checking/savings accounts, mortgages, and auto loans primarily to Nevada residents.
description_long: One Nevada Credit Union operates as a member-owned financial cooperative regulated and insured by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). The organization positions itself as Nevada's trusted credit union alternative to traditional national banks, with a stated mission of building a stronger Nevada through financial education and community support. The credit union serves individual consumers across the state with retail banking services and consumer lending products. Founded on principles of member benefit and community investment, One Nevada emphasizes lower rates than national banks and personalized service through local branch networks and digital channels. The organization advertises competitive rates on mortgages (as low as 6.285% APR for 30-year fixed), auto loans (as low as 5.49% APR), credit cards (as low as 11.75% APR), and various personal credit products. One Nevada distinguishes itself through promotional lending offers such as "90 days no payments" for qualified borrowers, instant pre-qualification tools, and insurance comparison services bundled into its digital platform. The credit union emphasizes digital banking capabilities, mobile check deposit, spending limits on credit cards, and on-demand alerts. Community engagement is a core differentiator, with the organization supporting local events, scholarships, and community development initiatives. One Nevada Credit Union is a legitimate, federally regulated financial institution well-suited for Nevada residents seeking competitive consumer lending and deposit products with a community-focused alternative to national banks. However, as a credit union, membership eligibility may have residency or employment restrictions, and service availability may be more limited geographically than national banks.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Federally insured by NCUA, providing deposit protection and regulatory oversight
Advertises rates significantly lower than national banks (mortgages from 6.285%, auto loans from 5.49%)
Promotional offer of 90 days no payments for qualified borrowers on direct financing
Instant online pre-qualification tool for loans without affecting credit score
Comprehensive digital banking with mobile check deposit, spending limits, and account alerts
Free insurance comparison and management tool for auto and home coverage
Community investment focus with scholarships and local event sponsorship
Multiple service channels including online, mobile app, and physical branch locations
cons: Credit union membership may have eligibility restrictions based on Nevada residency or employment
Geographic service limitations compared to national banks with broader branch networks
APR rates shown are "as low as" and vary by individual credit standing and collateral, not guaranteed rates
Limited information provided about specific membership requirements or fees on the website
Mortgage rates require phone contact rather than online quotes
best_for: Nevada residents seeking competitive mortgage or auto loan rates below national bank averages
Credit union members prioritizing community-focused banking with local support
Borrowers wanting to pre-qualify for loans without hard credit inquiries
Individuals seeking bundled insurance management and comparison tools with banking services
diagnosis: One Nevada Credit Union is best for Nevada residents seeking competitive consumer lending products (mortgages, auto loans, personal credit) with a community-focused alternative to national banks. The main caveat is that credit union membership eligibility may have residency or employment restrictions, and service availability is geographically limited to Nevada.
services: Checking and savings accounts with competitive rates
New and used auto loan financing
Digital banking with mobile app and online portal
90-day payment deferral promotions for qualified borrowers
Instant loan pre-qualification without credit impact
Automated account alerts and spending limits
Free insurance comparison and management platform
ATM access through branch and ATM network
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2645 S Mojave Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89121
